response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep web/full-stack and some systems-programming experience, but he is a weak match for this specific role. His professional C++ experience is brief (~7 months at National Instruments) and roughly a decade old; his recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. He shows no exposure to industrial automation, MQTT, IEC 62443/SDL, or the listed industrial protocols, which are core rather than optional requirements here.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic, conceptually adjacent to the role's performance demands
Event-driven architecture and message-based platform experience via GISCollective and microservices work
Proven mentorship and engineering-culture contributions (workshops, code katas, TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship)
concerns: Minimal and outdated professional C++/STL experience for a role that is fundamentally hands-on C++
No industrial cybersecurity background: no IEC 62443, SDL, or secure-development lifecycle exposure
No IoT/industrial automation domain experience (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0 all absent)
